phases.name: Config Extraction
phases.goal: Extract magic numbers and hardcoded values into constants

steps: Add constant LOG_ROTATION_SIZE_THRESHOLD_BYTES = 10 * 1024 * 1024  # 10MB at module level
Replace hardcoded 10 * 1024 * 1024 on line 193 with the constant
Run ruff check to verify
Add constant DISK_ALERT_THRESHOLD_PERCENT = 85 at module level
Replace hardcoded 85 on line 128 with the constant
Run ruff check to verify
Add FRONTEND_CRAWL_SKIP_PATTERNS list at module level (alongside other constants like HTTP_TIMEOUT)
Move skip patterns from lines 429-437 to the constant
Reference the constant in discover_frontend_pages()
Run ruff check to verify
Add WEBSOCKET_PROBE_PATHS list at module level
Move ws_paths list from line 332 to the constant
Reference the constant in discover_websocket_endpoints()
Run ruff check to verify

phases.name: DRY Violations - Small
phases.goal: Consolidate duplicate patterns within single files

tasks.description: Remove duplicate INDICATOR_SYMBOLS in market.py get_indicator_history
steps: In get_indicator_history, remove local 'indicators' dict (lines 611-616)
Use module-level INDICATOR_SYMBOLS constant instead
Run ruff check and pytest to verify

tasks.description: Remove redundant message sequence initialization in base.py
steps: Remove defensive check in _store_conversation_message (lines 827-828)
The initialization in _record_run_start (line 731) is sufficient
Run agent tests to verify
Add helper function _bytes_to_mb(bytes_value: int) -> float that returns round(bytes_value / (1024 * 1024), 2)
Replace all 6 instances of the inline formula with the helper call
Run ruff check to verify

phases.name: DRY Violations - Cross-File
phases.goal: Consolidate MARKET_SYMBOL constant to single source of truth

tasks.description: Consolidate MARKET_SYMBOL constant to shared location
steps: Check if backend/app/constants.py exists, create if not
Add MARKET_SYMBOL = '__MARKET__' to constants.py
Update market.py to import from constants.py
Update market_repository.py to import from constants.py
Update news_constants.py to import from constants.py
Run tests to verify no regressions

phases.name: Schedule Collision Fixes
phases.goal: Fix task schedule collisions to prevent resource contention

steps: Identify all 5 tasks at hour=5, minute=0, day_of_week=0
Update crontab definitions accordingly
Update any Notes comments for timing
Run ruff check to verify

tasks.description: Remove redundant expiry comments in celery_schedules.py
steps: Find all 14 instances of pattern: EXPIRY_X_HOUR # Task expires after X hour
Remove the redundant inline comments where constant name is self-documenting
Keep comments only where they add non-obvious context
Run ruff check to verify

phases.name: Function Decomposition - Backend
phases.goal: Break down large functions into smaller, focused helpers

steps: Add helper: _extract_output_tokens(response: LLMResponse) -> int | None
Replace duplicated ternary pattern on lines 490 and 506
Run agent tests to verify
Add helper: _filter_symbols_without_active_strategy(symbols: list[str], strategy_storage) -> list[str]
Consolidate duplicate symbol filtering logic from lines 570-577, 865-871, 645-654
Run strategy tests to verify
tasks.verification: pytest tests/tasks/test_strategy_monitoring.py -x -q 2>/dev/null || echo 'Tests may not exist'

steps: Extract _determine_archive_decision(strategy, metrics) -> tuple[bool, str]
Extract _update_strategy_storage(strategy, metrics, archived) for storage updates
Extract _record_and_emit_performance(strategy, metrics, status) for event emission
Refactor _evaluate_single_strategy to use these helpers
Run tests to verify no regressions

tasks.description: Extract event type validation helper in market.py
steps: Add helper: _validate_event_type(event_type: str) -> MarketEventType
Consolidate validation logic from get_market_events (lines 870-880) and create_market_event (lines 972-977)
Helper raises HTTPException if invalid
Run market API tests to verify

tasks.description: Add debug logging for skipped journal entries in status_logs.py
steps: In parse_journal_output (line 205), add structured debug logging for parse failures
Log: logger.debug('journal_entry_parse_failed', error=str(e), line=line[:100])
Run ruff check to verify

phases.name: Comment Cleanup
phases.goal: Remove dead code references and obsolete comments

steps: Find comments on lines 810, 853 referencing removed tasks
Either remove them or relocate to file header PREVIOUSLY DISABLED TASKS section
Run ruff check to verify
Create MaintenanceTableToolbar component (dry run toggle, backup status, run all button, refresh button)
Extract lines 282-345 from MaintenanceTable.tsx render
Pass required props (dryRun, setDryRun, backupStatus, handleRunAll, handleRefresh, isRefreshing)
Run npm run lint to verify
tasks.verification: cd frontend && npm run lint -- --max-warnings=0 2>/dev/null || npm run lint

steps: Create frontend/lib/hooks/useTableSort.ts
Implement hook with sortKey, sortDirection state and toggleSort function
Update MaintenanceTable.tsx to use the hook
Run npm run lint to verify

phases.name: Final Verification
phases.goal: Run full test suite and verify build

steps: cd backend
Run pytest tests/ -x --tb=short
Fix any test failures before proceeding
cd frontend
Run npm run build
Fix any build failures
